headline: Arthur J. Gallagher Investor Day: Reiterates 2026 Growth Plan, Expands AI Push, Sees Mid-Single Digit Organic Growth
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) used its quarterly investor meeting to reiterate its long-standing growth strategy, provide an update on insurance market conditions, and outline early organic growth expectations for the first quarter and full year 2026.
